Getting Started with Materials and Code

15 January 2024 ·less than 1 min read· materials programming

This is a dummy post to test the new blog layout.

You can use bold and italic text. The post has a back link to the blog, metadata (date, read time, tags), and a reading progress bar at the top.

Section example

Here is a list:

  • First item

def hello():
    print("Materials + Code")

That’s it for this test post.
